channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pot holes getting bigger with oncoming vehicles swerving to avoid, creating hazard to other motorists, 12th March
item.description:
Pottersfiled Rd, near junction with Byfield Close, Woodmancote GL52 9UA

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pottersfield Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A A pothole in road problem has been found, 12th March
item.description:
Two large potholes just after/before speedbump, can't avoid it and will cause damage
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greyhound Gardens, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yellow lines need re doing and clearer parking restrictions in place, 12th March
item.description:
Outside 1 & 3 Pilley Lane. The yellow lines on our side of the road are fading and need redoing and clearer restriction notices are needed. There is a commercial unit across the road about to open and as you can see in the picture people are parking in the loading bay and on the pavement because they believe it’s actual parking spaces. This is unacceptable. This is on a main school route and having to cross the road when there is parking on both sides is so dangerous. No one is adhering to road safety because it’s not clear.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Pilley Lane, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Build materials following extension works, 12th March
item.description:
Building materials

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 12th March
item.description:
On Friday the 30th of January 2026 at 19:30, Myself and my family were travelling on Alstone lane, Cheltenham. We hit a large group of pot holes located at what three words location

item.title: By village pond water covered so cant be seen, cars are catching tyres in it, 12th March
item.description:
On road by village pond
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blacksmiths Lane, Leigh, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Permit parking sign Zone 12 missing, 12th March
item.description:
This street Millbrook Gardens has several permit zone notices fixed to lamp posts. The lamp post marked has not got one and visitors to the apartment block 18-32 Millbrook Gardens have been given penalty notices, as they were not aware that this end of the street is permit parking due to the lack of signage. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Millbrook Gardens, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Left over car parts, 12th March
item.description:
Following a car going off the carriageway - roundabout there are a lot of car parts left on the roundabouts grass verge (ditch) abutting Miserden Road- these have been there for many months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Miserden Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 12th March
item.description:
Give Way Sign - Faded 600mm give way sign needs replacing.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Potholes, 12th March
item.description:
There are several large potholes forming in this location that are now forcing avoiding action towards the barriers or cones on the contra flow system. I don't want to have to click on all the holes but suggest you send someone to do a loop around the roadworks from the Shurdington road to the Enstone junction and back again as there are many holes opening up. Some (at the bottom of Crickly Hill) have markings, but many don't. There are some at Nettleton Bottom, some on the south bound side of the section from the air balloon roundabout to the birdlip junction. You really can't miss them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Cowley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole, 12th March
item.description:
Pot hole at the end of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Victoria Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham

item.title: Street lamp outside no 10 has been out for a few days, 11th March
item.description:
Street lamp outside no 10 has been out for a few days. It is very dark around here. Sometimes it turns on for a few minutes and flickers and it turns off.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walnut Close, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Another large pot hole, 11th March
item.description:
It's on the left hand side of Badgeworth Road when you're travelling north, just before you turn right in to The Reddings.
Report on FixMyStreet
